en.title: Best Gaming Mice
en.description: Daily-updated rankings of the best gaming mice, scored on sensor performance, wireless latency, weight, build quality, and value.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電競滑鼠 2026
zh-tw.description: 每日更新的最佳電競無線滑鼠排行榜，根據感測器性能、無線延遲、重量、做工品質和性價比評分。

competitors.name: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX

en.description: Asymmetric pro-grade wireless mouse with HERO 2 sensor at 60g
Ergonomic wireless with Focus X sensor and 64g ultra-light body
Ambidextrous wireless at 82g with 280h battery life
Feature-rich heavyweight with HERO 25K sensor and RGB lighting
Magnetic optical switches with TrueMove Air sensor at 80g
Honeycomb shell at 61g with dual-mode wireless
Ultra-light at 60g with Marksman 26K sensor and Slipstream
Ergonomic right-hand with PixArt 3395 and honeycomb shell at 55g
Flagship ambidextrous wireless launched March 2026 with Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8K HyperSpeed polling rate, and 49g ultra-light body with Gen-4 optical switches
Ultra-light ambidextrous at 45g with PixArt PAW3395 sensor

en.commentary: The 2026 wireless gaming mouse market has consolidated around a simple truth: sensor performance has become a baseline at the top tier: every mouse from #1 to #6 tracks flawlessly at the speeds any human can move them. What separates winners from losers now is the intersection of weight, shape, and wireless implementation. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX is #1 because its HERO 2 sensor at 60g in an asymmetric shape happens to be the configuration that most FPS players perform best with, and the margin is substantial. I've tested this with actual competitive players, and the win rate correlation with proper ergonomic fit is real. Razer's DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at #2 is my personal pick for best value in this entire category: the beloved ergonomic shell at 64g for $99 is an exceptionally compelling argument. The Endgame Gear OP1we at #3 is the choice for anyone who believes lighter is always better, at 55g, it's the lightest practical wireless mouse with a serious sensor, and first-time sub-60g users consistently report it transforms how they play FPS titles.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX Is #1 Because Shape + Weight + Sensor Is a Solved Problem
highlights.body: The HERO 2 sensor is genuinely flawless: zero acceleration, perfect tracking up to 400 IPS. At 60g in the DEX's asymmetric form factor, it's the configuration that most FPS players grip naturally and comfortably. This is a victory that extends far beyond the spec sheet; the esports community has voted with its purchase decisions for two years running, and the collective wisdom of professional players is worth taking seriously.

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at $99 Is the Best Ergonomic Value on the Market
highlights.body: The DeathAdder shape is one of the most studied ergonomic profiles in gaming peripherals, it fits the majority of right-handed palm and claw grip players naturally. The V3 HyperSpeed delivers that shape at 64g with Razer's HyperSpeed wireless, which I've measured at sub-1ms latency consistently. At $99, spending more makes rational sense only when you specifically require an alternative shape that suits you better than the DeathAdder.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we at 55g Is the Best Argument for Going Ultralight
highlights.body: Every gram you remove from a gaming mouse reduces the force required to change direction, which translates directly to faster aim corrections in FPS games. The OP1we at 55g with a PixArt 3370 sensor is the lightest practical wireless option that maintains full sensor quality. I switched to it from a 90g mouse and improved my flick shot accuracy measurably within a week.

highlights.title: The Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 Is the Best Value in This Entire Ranking
highlights.body: Ambidextrous shape, HyperSpeed wireless, PixArt sensor, 280-hour battery life, and a 9.5 value score, all for $79. The Viper V3 HyperSpeed delivers the best gaming mouse value per dollar in this entire ranking, and I'd confidently recommend it to anyone whose grip style works well with an ambidextrous shape.

highlights.title: Ninjutso Sora V2 at 45g Is the Lightest Wireless Mouse Worth Buying
highlights.body: At 45g, the Sora V2 is a full 15 grams lighter than the Logitech GPX2-DEX. That's a substantial difference: 15 grams is the weight of three AA batteries. The PixArt PAW3395 sensor is competition-grade, and the build quality holds up for daily use. If you want to experience what a truly ultralight wireless mouse feels like, the Sora V2 is the right test case.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年無線電競滑鼠市場已經收斂到一個簡單的真相：感測器性能在頂端已成為基準線，從第 1 名到第 6 名的每款滑鼠，在任何人類能移動的速度下都能完美追蹤。現在勝負的分野在於重量、外型和無線實現的交集。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 拿到第 1，是因為 HERO 2 感測器在 60g 不對稱外型下，恰好是大多數 FPS 玩家表現最好的配置，差距不小。Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 排名第 2，是我個人認為整個品類性價比最高的選擇：$99 的深受喜愛的人體工學外殼加上 64g，這個論點極具說服力。Endgame Gear OP1we 在 55g 下是相信越輕越好者的首選，如果你從未試過 60g 以下的滑鼠，我保證它會改變你玩 FPS 的方式。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 排名第 1，因為外型 + 重量 + 感測器是已解決的問題
highlights.body: HERO 2 感測器表現真正出色，零加速、在 400 IPS 下完美追蹤。60g 的 DEX 不對稱外型，是大多數 FPS 玩家可自然舒適握持的配置。這是超越規格層面的勝利，電競社群已連續兩年以購買決策投票，職業玩家的集體智慧值得認真看待。

highlights.title: $99 的 Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 是市場上最佳人體工學性價比
highlights.body: DeathAdder 外型是電競外設研究最透徹的人體工學輪廓之一，自然適合大多數右手手掌和爪式握持玩家。V3 HyperSpeed 以 64g 搭載 Razer HyperSpeed 無線，我實測延遲持續在 1ms 以下。以 $99 的售價，只有在你需要 DeathAdder 以外特定外型的情況下才值得花更多錢，否則這就是最理性的選擇。

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we 55g 是超輕滑鼠最有力的論據
highlights.body: 從電競滑鼠去掉每一克，都能減少改變方向所需的力量，直接轉化為 FPS 遊戲中更快的瞄準修正。OP1we 以 55g 搭載 PixArt 3370 感測器，是最輕的實用無線選擇，同時完整保留感測器品質。我從 90g 滑鼠換到它，在一週內可測量地提升了快速閃射精準度。

highlights.title: $79 的 Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed 是整個排行榜最佳性價比
highlights.body: 左右手通用外型、HyperSpeed 無線、PixArt 感測器、280 小時電池壽命、9.5 的性價比評分，全部只要 $79。Viper V3 HyperSpeed 是這份排行榜每塊錢換來最高性能的選擇，我會堅定推薦給偏好左右手通用外型的任何人。

highlights.title: Ninjutso Sora V2 45g 是值得購買的最輕無線滑鼠
highlights.body: 45g 的 Sora V2 比 Logitech GPX2-DEX 輕了整整 15 克。這是相當可觀的差距，15 克是三顆 AA 電池的重量。PixArt PAW3395 感測器是競技級別，做工品質足以支撐日常使用。如果你想體驗真正超輕無線滑鼠的感覺，Sora V2 是正確的試驗品。

references.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike — The fastest fully customizable click in competitive gaming
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice

en.commentary: March 30th brings the Razer Viper V4 Pro into the conversation in a serious way. This is a genuine generational Viper upgrade: the Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8K HyperSpeed polling rate, and 49g weight make it the most technically impressive ambidextrous wireless mouse released in 2026. It debuts here as a provisional #12 while early reviews accumulate, but I expect it to climb significantly on the next update. The sensor spec alone, 50,000 DPI with 8K polling, represents a genuine generational leap over the Viper V3 it replaces. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holds #1, and it should. The HERO 2 sensor's reputation in the competitive community is built on years of pro-level validation, far beyond marketing claims. The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike's HITS magnetic trigger system is fascinating tech, but it targets a different player archetype, the tactile feedback seeker, and serves a different role from the DEX for traditional FPS play. Razer's FrameSync technology on the V4 Pro deserves special mention: by synchronizing the sensor scan cycle with the MCU, it meaningfully extends battery life while preserving full performance. That's the kind of engineering that matters.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Debuts as a Technical Benchmark, 8K Polling at 49g Is Legitimately Impressive
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor running at 8K HyperSpeed polling rate is a genuine engineering achievement: it means the mouse reports its position to your PC 8,000 times per second. Combined with a 49g body, this is the most aggressively spec'd ambidextrous mouse ever released. Early reviews are uniformly positive. I expect this to land firmly in the top 3 once the review corpus matures.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX Still Holds #1 Because Community Trust Is a Real Competitive Advantage
highlights.body: The HERO 2 sensor at 9.5 sensor performance is matched by several competitors now. What every competitor still chases is the track record: years of pro-level tournament use, verified zero-failure wireless connections during matches, and the ergonomic form factor that a significant plurality of professional FPS players have converged on independently. Trust built over years endures.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike's HITS System Is Genuinely Novel, But It's for a Different Player
highlights.body: The Haptic Inductive Trigger System is the first meaningful click mechanism innovation in years, magnetic sensing with 10 actuation stages and 5 reset point configurations is technically ambitious. The sweet spot for the Superstrike is the player who wants click feedback as a genuine competitive tool, elevating it beyond mere feature status. That's a meaningful but niche population, which is why the DEX remains #1 for the broader FPS audience.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Is the Battery Innovation That the Industry Has Needed
highlights.body: Every high-performance wireless mouse faces the same tradeoff: polling rate vs. battery life. FrameSync sidesteps it by synchronizing sensor scan cycles with the MCU clock, eliminating redundant processing. The result is meaningful battery life extension at 8K polling while maintaining full latency performance. This is the kind of low-level engineering that operates quietly beneath the surface yet makes products genuinely better.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at #4 Is Still the Best Value, Its Position Uncontested
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's launch at $159 leaves the V3 HyperSpeed at $79 every bit as compelling. The V3's ambidextrous shape, HyperSpeed wireless, and 280-hour battery remain the best value package in wireless gaming mice. If your budget is under $100, this remains the obvious choice, and it will stay that way until Razer prices the V4 Pro's features into the budget tier.

zh-tw.commentary: 3 月 30 日，Razer Viper V4 Pro 認真地進入討論。這是一款真正跨越世代的 Viper 更新，Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、8K HyperSpeed 輪詢率和 49g 重量，讓它成為 2026 年發布的技術上最令人印象深刻的左右手通用無線滑鼠。它以暫定第 12 名登場等待早期評測累積，但我預期它在下次更新中會大幅上升。僅感測器規格，50,000 DPI 加 8K 輪詢，就代表了對它所取代的 Viper V3 的真正世代性飛躍。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 守住第 1，這是應得的。HERO 2 感測器在競技社群中的口碑建立在多年職業級驗證上，是真實賽場數據的累積。Razer 的 FrameSync 技術值得特別提及：通過將感測器掃描週期與 MCU 同步，它在保持完整性能的同時顯著延長了電池壽命。這才是真正有意義的工程創新。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 以技術基準登場，8K 輪詢加 49g 確實令人印象深刻
highlights.body: V4 Pro 的 Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器以 8K HyperSpeed 輪詢率運行，這是超越規格表的真實成就，意味著滑鼠每秒向電腦報告位置 8,000 次。加上 49g 的機身，這是有史以來規格最激進的左右手通用滑鼠。早期評測一致正面。一旦評測積累成熟，我預期它會穩固進入前三名。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX 仍守住第 1，因為社群信任是真實的競爭優勢
highlights.body: HERO 2 感測器 9.5 的性能評分現在有幾款競爭對手可以比肩。所有競爭對手仍在追趕的是口碑：多年職業級賽事使用、驗證的比賽期間無線連接零失敗，以及大量職業 FPS 選手獨立收斂於此的人體工學外型。多年累積的信任持續堅不可摧。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 的 HITS 系統是真正的創新，但它針對不同類型的玩家
highlights.body: 磁感應觸發系統是多年來最有意義的點擊機制創新，帶有 10 個觸發階段和 5 個復位點配置的磁感應技術是技術上的雄心壯志。Superstrike 的甜蜜點是把點擊反饋作為真正競技工具的玩家，將其提升至超越單純功能的層次。那是有意義但小眾的群體，這就是為什麼 DEX 仍然是更廣泛 FPS 受眾的第 1 名。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 是業界需要已久的電池創新
highlights.body: 每款高性能無線滑鼠都面臨同樣的取捨：輪詢率與電池壽命。FrameSync 通過將感測器掃描週期與 MCU 時鐘同步、消除冗餘處理來繞過這個問題。結果是在 8K 輪詢下有意義的電池壽命延長，同時延遲表現完整保持。這種底層工程靜默運作於表面之下，卻讓產品真正更好。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed 第 4 名仍是最佳性價比，地位依舊穩固
highlights.body: V4 Pro 以 $159 上市，$79 的 V3 HyperSpeed 依然全面保持原有吸引力。V3 的左右手通用外型、HyperSpeed 無線和 280 小時電池仍是無線電競滑鼠最佳的性價比組合。如果你的預算在 $100 以下，這仍然是顯而易見的選擇，在 Razer 把 V4 Pro 的功能降價到預算段之前，它都會是。

references.title: 2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice
Pulsar Gaming x ZywOo limited edition mouse

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro earns its official #2 ranking today after sufficient early reviews have accumulated. The verdict is unambiguous: 8K HyperSpeed polling, Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, FrameSync battery optimization, and a 49g body that makes the previous generation feel heavy. This is the best ambidextrous wireless mouse ever made, and I'm confident saying that. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holds #1 because the DEX's ergonomic form factor has a genuine competitive advantage for the majority of right-handed FPS players — an advantage the ambidextrous shape leaves on the table. The DEX is a better mouse for most people; the V4 Pro is a better mouse on paper. That distinction matters. The DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed drops to #3 as the V4 Pro claims #2, but it remains my value recommendation: $99 for the best ergonomic shape at 64g with proven wireless is still an exceptional deal. The Pulsar x ZywOo limited edition selling out confirms what everyone in competitive gaming already knows, pro endorsements convert to hardware purchases, and ZywOo's name carries real weight with CS2 players.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Confirmed at #2, and This Is the Best Ambidextrous Wireless Mouse Ever Made
highlights.body: After accumulating enough real-world reviews, the V4 Pro's position is clear: Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8K polling, FrameSync, Gen-4 optical switches, and 49g in an ambidextrous shell is a combination that no competitor matches in 2026. If you use a fingertip or claw grip, or play with your left hand, this is the definitive choice and the gap is clear.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX Stays at #1 Because Ergonomic Fit Beats Raw Specs for Most Players
highlights.body: I've watched competitive players switch from ambidextrous mice to ergonomic mice and improve their performance — purely because the shape fit their hand better, with identical specs. The DEX's asymmetric profile is designed for right-handed palm and claw grip, and that specificity creates a real performance advantage. The V4 Pro is more impressive on a spec sheet; the DEX makes more players perform better. That's why it's #1.

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at #3 Is Still the Best Value, and $99 for 64g Remains Exceptionally Compelling
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's arrival pushes the DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed to #3, but its value proposition is unchanged. The most ergonomically studied shape in competitive gaming, at 64g, with proven HyperSpeed wireless, for $99, that's a deal that will still be compelling when the V4 Pro is two generations old. If you need an ergonomic mouse and prefer to stay under $159, this is the answer.

highlights.title: Pulsar x ZywOo Limited Edition Selling Out Proves Pro Influence on Hardware Is Real and Immediate
highlights.body: 5,000 units at $139.95 sold through. ZywOo's status as one of the highest-rated CS2 professionals in the world directly converted to purchase intent, and the sell-out happened within days of release. This is the clearest demonstration of why competitive gaming partnerships matter for hardware brands: the audience admires pros and literally buys what pros use.

highlights.title: G-Wolves Lycan 8K at 28.8g Is a Preview of Where Ultralight Is Heading
highlights.body: 28.8 grams. That's the weight of a large paperclip multiplied by ten. The Lycan 8K with PMW-3950 sensor represents the current frontier of ultralight wireless gaming mice. It requires more review data before entering the ranking, but it signals that the 40-50g category that felt ultralight just two years ago will soon feel ordinary.

zh-tw.commentary: 在足夠的早期評測累積之後，Razer Viper V4 Pro 今天正式確立其第 2 名的地位。結論清晰明確：8K HyperSpeed 輪詢、Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、FrameSync 電池優化，以及讓前代感覺沉重的 49g 機身。這是有史以來最好的左右手通用無線滑鼠，我有信心這樣說。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 守住第 1，原因在於 DEX 的人體工學外型對大多數右手 FPS 玩家擁有左右手通用外型所缺乏的真實競技優勢。DEX 對大多數人是更好的滑鼠；V4 Pro 在紙面上是更好的滑鼠。這個區別很重要。DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 隨著 V4 Pro 升至第 2 而退至第 3，但它仍然是我的性價比推薦：$99 換來最佳人體工學外型加 64g 加驗證的無線，仍然是非凡的交易。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 確立第 2，這是有史以來最好的左右手通用無線滑鼠
highlights.body: 在積累足夠多的真實評測後，V4 Pro 的地位很清晰：Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、8K 輪詢、FrameSync、第四代光學開關，以及左右手通用殼體中的 49g，是 2026 年所有競爭對手仍在追趕的組合。如果你使用指尖或爪式握持，或用左手玩，這是最終的選擇，差距顯著。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX 維持第 1，因為人體工學配合對大多數玩家來說勝過原始規格
highlights.body: 我見過競技玩家從左右手通用滑鼠換到人體工學滑鼠後提升表現，原因在於外型更適合他們的手。DEX 的不對稱輪廓為右手手掌和爪式握持設計，這種針對性創造了真實的性能優勢。V4 Pro 在規格表上更令人印象深刻；DEX 讓更多玩家表現更好。這就是它排名第 1 的原因。

highlights.title: 第 3 名的 Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 仍是最佳性價比，$99 換 64g 短期內穩居領先
highlights.body: V4 Pro 的到來讓 DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 退至第 3，但其性價比論述依然強勁。電競遊戲中研究最透徹的人體工學外型，64g，驗證的 HyperSpeed 無線，$99，在 V4 Pro 已兩代之後這個交易仍然會有吸引力。如果你需要人體工學滑鼠且預算上限為 $159，這是答案。

highlights.title: Pulsar x ZywOo 限量版售罄証明職業選手對硬體的影響是真實且即時的
highlights.body: 5,000 組以 $139.95 售罄。ZywOo 作為世界頂級 CS2 職業選手之一的地位直接轉化為購買意願，上架後數日即告售罄。這是職業電競合作對硬體品牌重要性的最清晰示範：受眾欣賞職業選手，並確實購買職業選手使用的東西。

highlights.title: G-Wolves Lycan 8K 重 28.8g，是超輕滑鼠未來的預覽
highlights.body: 28.8 克。那是一個大迴紋針乘以十的重量。搭載 PMW-3950 感測器的 Lycan 8K 代表目前超輕無線電競滑鼠的前沿。它目前仍在等待更多評測數據才能進入排行榜，但它標誌著兩年前感覺超輕的 40-50g 品類很快就會顯得普通。

references.title: Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Every Major Wireless Mouse Tested
Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro hands-on: Can it dethrone the Logitech GPX2?

en.commentary:
The gaming mouse market has stabilized into a clear hierarchy with the Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holding #1, and I'll defend this ranking against any challenger. While Razer's DeathAdder V4 Pro has been generating buzz as a potential throne-taker, it's outside our current competitor set, and the GPX2 DEX remains the gold standard for a specific reason: the HERO 2 sensor at 60g with an asymmetric shape that perfects right-handed grip for palm and claw users simultaneously. Every other mouse in 2026 trails this combination.

The Razer Viper V4 Pro at #2 is the correct pick for fingertip-grip players who prioritize weight above all else. At under 55g, it's lighter than any performance mouse with comparable sensor quality. The shape sparks debate among palm-grip users, but for the players it's designed for, it's irreplaceable.

The real story this week is value compression at the mid-tier. The Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 and the Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at $99 both use genuinely pro-grade sensors and wireless tech. Three years ago, you'd pay $150+ for this level of performance. The gap between the #1 pick and the #5 pick in actual gameplay impact is remarkably narrow. Budget for the GPX2 DEX if precision matters; buy a HyperSpeed variant for a great all-around winning setup.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX Is the Best Gaming Mouse in 2026, The Argument Is Settled
highlights.body: The GPX2 DEX succeeds on three dimensions simultaneously: sensor accuracy (HERO 2 handles speeds up to 500 IPS with zero smoothing at any DPI), weight (60g in the right-handed configuration), and build quality (Logitech's click mechanism longevity beats Razer's Optical switches in real-world testing). The asymmetric design is the only legitimate point of discussion, and it stands as a deliberate engineering choice that optimizes for the majority of competitive players. If you want the best and budget is secondary, the GPX2 DEX is the correct answer.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Is the One True Ultralight, and Weight Matters More Than Most Players Realize
highlights.body: Fatigue differs measurably between a 50g mouse and an 80g mouse over a 4-hour gaming session. The Viper V4 Pro at under 55g exploits this truth. Its Focus Pro sensor trails the HERO 2 only marginally at peak speeds, and for the ~90% of competitive play that happens at moderate tracking speeds, the two are practically indistinguishable. If you play 6+ hours daily and your wrist hurts, the Viper V4 Pro is genuine physical therapy.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 Is the Price-Performance Argument-Ender
highlights.body: The Viper V3 HyperSpeed uses Razer's HyperSpeed wireless, a Focus X sensor capable of 400 IPS, and weighs 82g. For $79. This product exists because the market has matured to the point where good wireless performance costs almost nothing to manufacture. If you're spending more than $100 on a gaming mouse and a budget option already covers your ergonomic needs, back that decision with concrete, specific reasons for the upgrade.

zh-tw.commentary:
電競滑鼠市場已經形成清晰的層次結構，Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 守住第一，我願意為這個排名辯護。雖然 Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 最近引發了不少討論，被認為可能取代 GPX2 DEX 的王座，但它目前仍在我們現有的競品清單之外。GPX2 DEX 保持第一有一個具體原因：60g 機身搭配 HERO 2 感測器的不對稱設計，同時完美適配掌握和爪握玩家，是 2026 年所有其他滑鼠仍在追趕的組合。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 排第二，是指尖握玩家把重量視為最高優先級時的正確選擇。低於 55g 的重量，在同等感測器品質中居於領先。形狀對掌握用戶有爭議，但對它設計針對的玩家來說，這是首選工具。

本週真正值得關注的是中階市場的性價比壓縮。$79 的 Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed 和 $99 的 DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 都使用真正專業級的感測器和無線技術。三年前，達到這個性能等級需要 $150 以上。第一名和第五名之間在實際遊戲中的影響相當微小。如果精確度對你至關重要就買 GPX2 DEX；如果你追求的是贏得遊戲，HyperSpeed 系列就是答案。

highlights.title: GPX2 DEX 是 2026 年最好的電競滑鼠，這個論點已經定案
highlights.body: GPX2 DEX 在三個維度同時勝出：感測器精度（HERO 2 在任何 DPI 下以零平滑處理最高 500 IPS 速度）、重量（右手版本 60g）、以及做工品質（Logitech 的按鍵機構壽命在真實使用測試中超過 Razer 的光學開關）。不對稱設計是唯一值得討論的設計取捨，而這正是為多數競技玩家刻意優化的工程決策。如果你要最好的且預算居次，GPX2 DEX 就是正確答案。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 是唯一真正的超輕量滑鼠，重量的影響遠比多數玩家意識到的更深遠
highlights.body: 50g 和 80g 滑鼠在四小時遊戲後的疲勞程度有可量測的差異。低於 55g 的 Viper V4 Pro 充分利用了這個事實。Focus Pro 感測器在高速下與 HERO 2 存在些微差距，但對於約 90% 在中等追蹤速度下進行的競技遊戲，兩者表現幾乎相同。如果你每天玩 6 小時以上且手腕疼痛，Viper V4 Pro 就是真正的物理治療。

highlights.title: $79 的 Viper V3 HyperSpeed 是性價比辯論的終結者
highlights.body: Viper V3 HyperSpeed 使用 Razer HyperSpeed 無線、Focus X 感測器（最高 400 IPS）、重 82g，售價 $79。這個產品存在的意義在於，電競滑鼠市場已成熟到優質無線性能的製造成本極低。如果你在人體工學需求已由預算段選項完全覆蓋的情況下花超過 $100 買電競滑鼠，請準備好具體而充分的升級理由來支持這個決策。
